subcodes.first_line: Rejoice, inasmuch as thou art mentioned before the Throne and inscribed by My Most Exalted Pen, and art standing in service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان افرح بما کنت مذکورا لدی العرش و مسطورا من قلمی الاعلی و قائما علی خدمه
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
